images.title: Hero Image - Beyond Repository Boundaries
images.caption:
*Beyond single-repo limits: Agent Hive extends its reach to coordinate AI agents working across any accessible GitHub repository.*

---
images.prompt: Create an image showing AI agents breaking free from single-repository confinement to work across multiple repositories. A central Agent Hive beehive structure sits on one platform (labeled "Your Hive"), with glowing bridge connections extending outward to multiple distant repository islands floating in a digital space. Each distant island represents a different GitHub repository with its own codebase structure visible. Agent bees travel along these bridges carrying task packages and returning with code contributions. The scene conveys expansion, reach, and coordinated work across boundaries. Epic digital landscape illustration, floating island aesthetic, sense of connectivity and reach, warm collaborative energy against cool digital backdrop.

images.title: The target_repo Extension
images.caption:
*One simple extension: add target_repo to the project doc and the dispatcher can clone, inspect, and package external repository context.*

---
images.prompt: Create an image showing the simplicity of the target_repo YAML extension as an elegant key unlocking external access. A glowing project document shows the target_repo field being added like inserting a key into a lock. The key opens a gateway portal that reveals a view into an external repository's structure, including files, code, and README. The concept is minimal addition, maximum new capability. Clean conceptual illustration, key-and-lock metaphor, elegant simplicity, the power of a small extension.

images.title: Context Assembly Pipeline
images.caption:
*Context assembly: Clone (depth=1), extract file tree, read key files, build issue context, clean up. All automatic when target_repo is set.*

---
images.prompt: Create an image showing the context assembly pipeline for external repositories as a manufacturing assembly line. Stage 1: A git clone operation pulls a repository from the cloud (GitHub octocats visible). Stage 2: A scanning machine extracts the file tree structure. Stage 3: Key files (package.json, README.md, src/index) are read and their contents captured. Stage 4: Everything is assembled into a rich issue context package ready for the agent. Stage 5: Cleanup—the temporary clone is deleted (recycling symbol). The pipeline shows efficiency and thoroughness in preparing external repo context. Assembly line illustration, sequential process visualization, clean and efficient aesthetic.

images.title: Multi-Phase Workflow - Analysis Phase
images.caption:
*Phase 1 - Analysis: Before implementing, agents thoroughly examine the target repository—architecture, stack, patterns, opportunities.*

---
images.prompt: Create an image representing Phase 1 (Analysis) of a cross-repo improvement workflow. An AI agent with an investigator/researcher aesthetic examines an external repository through a magnifying glass or detective lens. The agent is taking notes on a clipboard, identifying: architecture structure (boxes and arrows), technology stack (framework/library icons), coding patterns (code snippets in bubbles), and improvement opportunities (lightbulb icons over problem areas). The external repo is visualized as a transparent building where the agent can see inside. Investigation/analysis illustration, detective aesthetic, thorough examination visualization, discovery and understanding.

images.title: Multi-Phase Workflow - Strategy Phase
images.caption:
*Phase 2 - Strategy: Evaluate options, select the best improvement, document rationale. High impact, low risk, well-scoped—ready to implement.*

---
images.prompt: Create an image representing Phase 2 (Strategy) of a cross-repo improvement workflow. An AI agent in an architect/strategist pose stands before a planning board or blueprint table. On the board: multiple improvement options are sketched (A, B, C), with one circled as "SELECTED". Decision criteria are visible: Impact gauge (HIGH), Risk meter (LOW), Scope indicator (SINGLE PR). The agent is drawing an implementation plan as a flowchart with clear steps. The mood is thoughtful decision-making and strategic planning. Strategic planning illustration, architect/designer aesthetic, decision-making visualization, focused and intentional.

images.title: Multi-Phase Workflow - Implementation Phase
images.caption:
*Phase 3 - Implementation: Generate code, prepare files, create the PR. From analysis to strategy to tangible contribution.*

---
images.prompt: Create an image representing Phase 3 (Implementation) of a cross-repo improvement workflow. An AI agent as a builder/engineer is actively constructing code, with code blocks being assembled like building blocks. The agent creates a new file (src/utils/retry.ts), modifies existing files, and prepares a PR package. A GitHub PR preview shows "Add exponential backoff retry logic". The scene conveys active creation and the transition from planning to building. The final output is a complete pull request ready for submission. Builder/engineer illustration, construction aesthetic, active creation and assembly, productive and accomplished.

images.title: Narrative Continuity Thread
images.caption:
*Narrative continuity: the project doc carries the story across phases, while canonical task and run state stays structured under `.hive/`.*

---
images.prompt: Create an image showing the narrative project document as a continuous thread or scroll that connects all three phases of a cross-repo workflow. The document unrolls vertically or horizontally, showing Phase 1 analysis notes flowing into Phase 2 strategy decisions flowing into Phase 3 implementation details. Around it, canonical task cards and run artifacts provide the structured machine layer for the same work. Contrast this with an alternative shown as fragmented notes that do not connect well. Scroll and thread illustration, continuity visualization, connected and coherent.

images.title: Cross-Repo Use Cases
images.caption:
*Use cases: Open source contributions, multi-repo organization changes, integration development. Same pattern—target_repo extends Agent Hive's reach.*

---
images.prompt: Create an image showing three diverse cross-repository use cases as three scenes in a triptych or three connected windows. Scene 1 "Open Source Contributions": An agent contributing improvements to a popular library (star-rated repo, community icons). Scene 2 "Multi-Repo Organizations": Agents coordinating changes across API, Frontend, and Docs repos with dependency arrows between them. Scene 3 "Integration Development": An agent studying a vendor SDK to build integrations, with the SDK repo and your app repo connected. Each scene shows the target_repo concept in action for different real-world scenarios. Triptych illustration, three use case vignettes, diverse but unified aesthetic, practical and applicable.
